details: Investigating Refinement 1 numeric formats: deep-K acc=False precision miss. Snapshot committed.

Read descriptor, compute kernel, helper hpp+inl(330-450). Confirmed: pack_reconfig at inl:394 gated on (packer_l1_acc||fp32_acc). acc=False+l1_acc=false => no reconfig => interm MUST==out format. Output dtype always = input dtype (matmul.py:158). K-spill: DEST(16b when acc=F) -> pack interm(fmt) -> reload -> ... double rounding per K-block boundary.

name: EXP1_diagnosis
result: CONFIRMED 16-bit DEST accum. K-sweep bf8b/bf8b acc=F: RMS 0.031->0.385 as K 512->8192, rms/sqrt(K) RISES (0.0014->0.0043) so worse than pure sqrt(K) random walk. INTERM ISOLATION @K8192 acc=F: bf8b-interm RMS=0.3854 vs bf16-interm(same bf8b-quant inputs)=0.1206 => 3.2x. bf8b interm spill is meaningful secondary; 16-bit DEST is primary. acc=True floor: 0.0169. KEY: bf16-interm alone gets bf8b acc=F to 0.12 < 0.15 target => motivates Lever B.
